message:
test: add refinement map conformance tests (bd-3g13z)

Seven tests validating Rust implementation state transitions match the
Lean specification's Step constructors through the abstraction function α.
Covers spawn, cancel protocol, region close, obligation lifecycle, and
stuttering preservation using CancellationProtocol/Quiescence/TaskLeak oracles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
